codeReview.summary: The feature partially implements NPC indicators and mobile tap-target adjustments, but it misses immediate indicator updates on quest completion and changes the required available-quest indicator color from yellow to grey for side quests.

issues.description: NPC markers are only refreshed on QUEST_ACCEPTED and QUEST_TURNED_IN plus the 500ms polling path; there is no QUEST_COMPLETED listener, so completing objectives does not trigger the required event-driven immediate change from '!' to '?' when quest state flips to completed.

Available side quests return a grey '!' (#95a5a6), but the feature explicitly requires a floating yellow '!' for NPCs with available quests. This changes the specified UI behavior rather than preserving it.

summary: Reviewed the feature's mission metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, ui-worker skill, and commit 6f71ee6. The implementation adds a pure NPC-indicator helper, broadens marker support to any quest-bearing NPC, and increases some tap targets, but it does not fully satisfy the feature because quest completion does not update indicators via EventBus immediately and available side quests use a grey indicator instead of the required yellow one.
